en.extract:
The flame-eared honeyeater (Lichmera flavicans), also known as the yellow-eared honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''flame-eared honeyeater''' ('''''Lichmera flavicans'''''), also known as the '''yellow-eared honeyeater''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is found on [[Timor]] island. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
